2026-04-20.content:
## 📢 Weekly Release Notes (2026-04-20 to 2026-04-26)

### ✨ What's New
• **intake edit**
  INTERNAL

• **Feat/posthog role fields**
  INTERNAL

• **intake file viewer and csv preview**
  You can now open uploaded files more easily and preview CSV files before using them.

• **Add disable signup portal feature with localization support**
  You can now see a clear signup-closed message in your language when new account registration is unavailable.

• **custom field task UI support**
  You can now view and use custom fields in tasks more smoothly, with the same familiar task screen experience.

### 🐛 Fixed
• **implement TaskListTableHeader component and corresponding tests**
  INTERNAL

• **standardize code formatting and update popover menu layout …**
  INTERNAL

• **Preserve abbreviation precision for zero-decimal currencies in useCurrency hook**
  INTERNAL

• **enhance mobile responsiveness and layout adjustments for EU invoice template**
  INTERNAL

• **add public invoice page title generation and tests**
  You can now see clearer page titles on public invoice pages, making it easier to know which invoice you’re viewing.

• **update project total task counts on task deletion**
  When you delete a task, your project’s total task count now updates correctly.

• **add null check for member role in deleteMember function**
  INTERNAL

### ⚡ Improvements
• **add select all functionality for change visiblily to default for row checkbox**
  You can now select all rows at once and quickly set their visibility by default in tables.

• **remove invoice dep in discount in ORDER.CREATED event**
  INTERNAL
